name: autoplan
tagline: Runs gstack's CEO/design/eng/DX plan reviews back-to-back, auto-deciding intermediate questions via 6 fixed principles.
verdict: Very thorough, deterministic review orchestrator with strong failure handling and idempotent state markers. Weak spots: 1852-line SKILL.md barely split into references (Q07/H05 fail), no scope-exclusion guidance (Q02), and undisclosed side effects -- CLAUDE.md auto-commits, git commits, and a telemetry/config system not mentioned in the description (S11).

highlights.summary: Remote telemetry call gated only on $_TEL != 'off'; if unset before the consent prompt runs, it is not literally 'off' and could fire pre-consent.

Description only says it runs review skills, but body edits+auto-commits CLAUDE.md, e.g. line 300: 'Then commit the change: `git add CLAUDE.md && git commit -m "chore: add gstack skill routing rules t
Frontmatter description states what the pipeline does but the explicit trigger phrasing ('use when asked to auto review...') lives in the body, not the description field.
